No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course's cognitive engagement (logic, probability) and social interaction (group competitions) can indirectly contribute to mental well-being, aligning with Target 3.4.
evidence: 橋牌運動中的機率與理則學 (The Probability and Logic in Bridge Sports)

Quality Education.reason: As a university seminar, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops 'Speculation and Innovation Capacity' and 'Self-Development' (Target 4.4), and 'Self-Directed Learning' (Target 4.7).

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No evidence in the course description links to peace, justice, rule of law, or institutional development.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly develops 'Communication and Teamwork' through 'group competitions,' fostering skills essential for effective partnerships (Target 17.17).
